text_original: When one is about to take an inspiration, he is sure to make a (previous) expiration;
text_normalized: When one is about to take an inspiration, he is sure to make a (previous) expiration;

text_original: when he is going to weaken another, he will first strengthen him;
text_normalized: when he is going to weaken another, he will first strengthen him;

text_original: when he is going to overthrow another, he will first have raised him up;
text_normalized: when he is going to overthrow another, he will first have raised him up;

text_original: when he is going to despoil another, he will first have made gifts to him:
text_normalized: when he is going to despoil another, he will first have made gifts to him:

text_original: - this is called 'Hiding the light (of his procedure).'
text_normalized: - this is called 'Hiding the light (of his procedure).'

text_original: The soft overcomes the hard; and the weak the strong.
text_normalized: The soft overcomes the hard; and the weak the strong.

text_original: Fishes should not be taken from the deep;
text_normalized: Fishes should not be taken from the deep;

text_original: instruments for the profit of a state should not be shown to the people.
text_normalized: instruments for the profit of a state should not be shown to the people.
